text: Reaction: When the dynasty phase ends during the first round of the game, bow this stronghold. Choose two facedown non-stronghold provinces, one controlled by you and the other by an opponent - reveal those provinces, then break them.
name: Ebony Blood Garrison

text: Tutored — Writ of Survey. Reaction: After this character wins a conflict - the losing player loses 1 honor. (Unlimited.)
flavorText: "So, what tragedy did I cause this day?"
name: Yasuki Yoshi

text: [conflict-political] Conflict Action: Initiate a [conflict-military] duel - resolve the duel. Bow the duel's loser and dishonor the duel's winner.
flavorText: "His cup runs dry, and a flask of poison is unstopped."
name: Shōchū Brawl

text: Conflict Action: Initiate a [conflict-political] duel against a character your opponent controls of their choice - resolve the duel. Honor each contestant character (in this duel). Then, the controller of the winner may choose to move each contestant home.
name: Dōji Reiha

text: Tutored — Writ of Sanctification. Each Imperial character or character with an Imperial attachment on your side gets +1[conflict-military] and +1[conflict-political] during conflicts against a tainted or Corrupt character. Conflict Action: Even from home, choose a character participating alone - that character gains Corrupt for this conflict.
name: Kakita Mio

text: Courtier or Magistrate character only. Attached character gains: "Conflict Action: Choose a participating character with printed cost lower than this character (lower or equal instead, if this character is Magistrate) - dishonor that character."
name: Truth Burns Through Lies

text: Conflict Action: Bow this stronghold. Initiate a [conflict-military] or [conflict-political] duel (your choice) against a character your opponent controls of their choice - resolve the duel. If you win the duel, reveal 2 random cards from the loser's hand, then you choose and discard one of those cards.
name: Tranquil Overlook Dojo

text: Reaction: After you play this character - search your dynasty deck for a non-unique character with printed cost 2 or less and play that character at home paying 1 less fate. Shuffle.
flavorText: "The Fortunes must have smiled on us."
name: Agasha Ayako

text: Duel Challenge: If the opposing character in this duel is dishonored - add 2 to your duel total. Conflict Action: If this character is attacking unopposed - draw 2 cards, then discard 2 cards.
flavorText: "Which is sharper, his mind or his blade?"
name: Kitsuki Sano

text: Costs 1 less to play while you control a Scout or Beastmaster character. While this character is participating in a conflict, it must be chosen as the target of each Action ability triggered by an opponent, if able.
name: Shineko

text: Reaction: After a card effect moves home a character you control, discard a card from your hand or discard the Imperial Favor – move that character to the conflict.
flavorText: "Put steel in your heart, and the steel in your hand will never falter."
name: Steadfast Orator

text: Restricted. Bushi character only. Reaction: After this card attaches to a character - look at the top X cards of your conflict deck. Put 1 of those cards into your hand. Shuffle. X is equal to twice the printed glory of attached character.
name: Sensei's Heirloom

text: Conflict Action: While defending, if you have 9 or higher honor, bow this stronghold. The attacking player chooses a character they control - send it home.
name: Inquisitor's Grove

text: This character contributes its glory to glory counts even while bowed. Action: Return 1 or more rings from your claimed ring pool to the unclaimed ring pool - you gain 1 honor for each ring returned this way.
name: Steward of Celestial Order

text: Conflict Action: If you control a Shugenja character, choose a number of participating non-unique characters with up to 4 total printed cost - move them home. Then, with Fire affinity gain 1 honor. (Max 1 per conflict.)
flavorText: The chords that held the stars were broken. Their descent cried out an end to harmony.
name: Serenade of a Thousand Lanterns

text: Reaction: After an opponent loses 1 or more honor, bow this stronghold – draw a card. Reaction: After an opponent gains 1 or more honor, bow this stronghold – take 1 honor from that opponent.
name: Theatre of Honest Lies

text: Reaction: After you pass on declaring a conflict, choose an opponent - take 1 honor from that opponent. (Max 1 per round.)
flavorText: The wolfsbane is slow to deliver its verdict, but death is inevitable and just.
name: Bird Helm Adjudicator

text: Ephemeral. Conflict Action: Look at the top 3 cards of an opponent's conflict deck – you may immediately play one of those cards as if it were in your hand. Then, discard the rest.
name: A Swallow's Return

text: Action: During the conflict phase, sacrifice a (friendly) character - you may declare an additional [conflict-military] conflict this phase.
flavorText: "For every offense there is an equal and just repercussion."
name: Herald of Justice

text: Interrupt: When you declare a conflict, lose 1 honor. Choose a number greater than 0 - your opponent declares defenders for this conflict. Then declare the conflict (choosing attackers, ring, conflict type, and province). You must declare a number of attackers equal to the number you chose.
name: Under the New Moon

text:
Peaceful.
[conflict-military] Conflict Action: If attached character is outnumbered - injure it.
flavorText: "These are the Moto's ancestral gods. Gods of punishment."
name: Sigil of Condemnation

text: Reaction: After this province is revealed – look at the top 8 cards of your dynasty deck. Put 1 of those cards into each of your non-stronghold provinces faceup. Shuffle.
flavorText: "Hardships would lay before them all. But as Hantei Botan watched the shoreline approach, she realized she did not feel even a little afraid."
name: Landfall

text: Reaction: After you win a conflict in which the total skill of both sides combined was 25 or higher - take 1 honor from your opponent (2 honor instead if you control a Storyteller character.) (Max 1 per conflict.)
flavorText: The historian's brush illuminates the truth - and embellishes the victor's legend.
name: Chronicles of Valor

text: Conflict Action: If your side is outnumbered, choose a Bushi character with printed cost 3 or less in your provinces or hand - put that character into play on your side, honored if it is Yōjimbō.
flavorText: Their charge's heartbeat is their legacy - to protect it is to guard their own soul.
name: Devotion in Action

text: Conflict Action: Choose a Monk character on your side and choose a character on the enemy side - for this conflict, that Monk character gets +2[conflict-military] and the enemy character loses all Traits.
name: Lightning Ascends

text: Conflict Action: Choose up to 2 defending characters on your side - move those characters home. Then, if you control a Commander character, you may ready one of those characters.
flavorText: Tomorrow's victory is written in blood spared today.
name: Retreat to Safety

text: Reaction: After 1 or more fate is removed from an opponent's character outside the fate phase (including by that character being discarded), choose an opponent - that opponent chooses and dishonors a character they control. If you control a Magistrate character, you may resolve this ability twice. (Max 1 per phase.)
name: Trail of Blood and Lies

text: Ephemeral. Action: Each player in turn order chooses up to 2 attachments they control - remove each other attachment from the game.
flavorText: "Hope should be the foundation upon which the young Empress's castle is built."
name: Tribute to a New Dawn

text: [conflict-military] Conflict Action: Each character you control gets +1[conflict-military] for this conflict (+2[conflict-military] instead if you control a participating Scout character).
flavorText: "Hidden paths unfold - fortune's footsteps guide the bold."
name: Use the Terrain

text: Action: Name a card type. Reveal the top 3 cards of your conflict deck (top 4 cards instead if you control an Artisan character) – add up to 2 revealed cards of that type to your hand and discard the rest.
flavorText: The chisel slowly recalls its native shape; the jade remembers what it was made to become.
name: Work in Progress
